title: Xtra Cheesy Ukrainian Haricot Bean Casserole
description: A funky, cheese-pull, brunch-mood Ukrainian dish featuring haricot beans, braise, and kosher-friendly ingredients, served in a bento-box vessel. This recipe is perfect for a unique breakfast or brunch experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onion and minced garlic over medium heat until softened.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Stir in the haricot beans, salt, black pepper, and paprika, and cook for 2 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked bean mixture, shredded cheddar cheese, and beaten eggs.
Stir in the kosher sour cream until well combined.
Spoon the mixture into a bento-box vessel or a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
